experiments.title: Trigger the email popup on exit-intent instead of blocking the hero on load
experiments.hypothesis: A full-screen subscribe popup overlays the hero on load across the homepage and PDPs, taxing the first impression before a visitor sees the product or value proposition.
experiments.primary_change: Switch the email popup to fire on exit-intent or after ~20s/scroll, and keep the reward offer; never overlay the hero on first load.
experiments.decision_rule: Ship if Bounce rate / homepage engagement improves without hurting site-wide conversion.

experiments.title: Add visible social proof and trust badges to PDPs
experiments.hypothesis: The Organic Sleep Tea PDP has a review widget but no visible review count, rating, organic-certification badge, or guarantee near the buy box, so a premium-priced product lacks reassurance at the decision point.
experiments.primary_change: Surface star rating + review count, an organic/quality badge, and a satisfaction guarantee directly under the price and add-to-cart.
experiments.decision_rule: Ship if Add-to-cart / PDP conversion rate improves without hurting site-wide conversion.

experiments.title: Add benefit-led navigation to collections
experiments.hypothesis: Collections list teas by name with no benefit filters, asking shoppers to decode products rather than shop their goal (sleep, digestion, immunity).
experiments.primary_change: Add benefit chips/filters ('For sleep', 'For digestion', 'For immunity', 'Daily ritual') and benefit-led section headers to the collection.
experiments.decision_rule: Ship if Collection click-through to PDP improves without hurting site-wide conversion.

experiments.title: Launch a tea + accessory ritual bundle
experiments.hypothesis: Teas and accessories (mug, infuser, tea bags) are sold separately; the brand's 'ritual' positioning is a natural fit for a starter kit that lifts basket size.
experiments.primary_change: Create a 'Zen Ritual Starter Kit' bundling a featured tea + mug + infuser at a modest bundle discount, merchandised on home and collections.
experiments.decision_rule: Ship if Average order value improves without hurting site-wide conversion.

experiments.title: Add 'complete your ritual' cross-sell to PDPs
experiments.hypothesis: The PDP has no cross-sell near the buy box, missing the obvious accessory and sampler attach for a ritual product.
experiments.primary_change: Add a 'Complete your ritual' module under add-to-cart suggesting an infuser, mug, or a complementary sampler.
experiments.primary_kpi: Average order value / units per order
experiments.decision_rule: Ship if Average order value / units per order improves without hurting site-wide conversion.

experiments.title: Offer subscribe-and-save on consumable teas
experiments.hypothesis: Tea is a repeat-consumption ritual product, but PDPs offer only one-time purchase, leaving recurring revenue and retention on the table.
experiments.primary_change: Add a subscribe-and-save option (e.g. 10% off, monthly/bi-monthly) to consumable tea PDPs with easy management.
experiments.primary_kpi: Subscription opt-in rate / repeat purchase rate
experiments.decision_rule: Ship if Subscription opt-in rate / repeat purchase rate improves without hurting site-wide conversion.

experiments.title: Surface the Ambassador / loyalty program at key moments
experiments.hypothesis: The Ambassador Program is buried in the footer and never surfaced at purchase or post-purchase, so an existing loyalty asset goes unused.
experiments.primary_change: Promote the Ambassador Program in the post-purchase flow, account area, and a homepage band, with a clear reward and share path.
experiments.decision_rule: Ship if Referral / repeat-customer rate improves without hurting site-wide conversion.

experiments.title: Build functional intent landing pages
experiments.hypothesis: High-intent functional searches ('best organic tea for sleep', 'tea for heartburn') have no dedicated landing pages; the benefit content is buried in product copy and blog posts.
experiments.primary_change: Create benefit landing pages (sleep, digestion, immunity) with the relevant teas, proof, FAQs and internal links from blog content.
experiments.decision_rule: Ship if Organic landing-page sessions and conversion improves without hurting site-wide conversion.

experiments.title: Commercialize the founder and education content

evidence.store_profile_ref: proof:founder Jesse Rojas story; content_theme:tea education

experiments.hypothesis: The founder/family story and tea-education content build trust but do not route readers to products or a brand-story shopping path.
experiments.primary_change: Add product modules and 'shop the story' CTAs into the founder post and education articles, linking to relevant teas and samplers.
experiments.decision_rule: Ship if Content-attributed sessions to PDP improves without hurting site-wide conversion.

experiments.title: Reduce page weight and failed third-party scripts
experiments.hypothesis: Pages fire 200+ requests with ~20 console errors from failed third-party (shop.app) scripts, and the best-sellers collection took ~10s to load in capture — a real speed and reliability drag on conversion.
experiments.primary_change: Audit and lazy-load imagery, defer/remove failing third-party scripts, and compress hero/product images to cut requests and load time.
experiments.decision_rule: Ship if Page load time (LCP) and bounce improves without hurting site-wide conversion.
